# UX Requirements Quality Checklist: Catalog UI Design and Stability

**Purpose**: Validate that UX, design system, accessibility, and interaction requirements in the spec are complete, clear, consistent, and measurable (requirements quality, not implementation verification).  
**Created**: 2026-03-15  
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command. Items test whether requirements are well-written and verifiable, not whether the implementation works.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are requirements defined for all interactive states (focus, hover, active, disabled) for Catalog controls? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK002 Are loading-state requirements specified for list, search, and save operations? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements for the dedicated validation list/panel (grouping, pagination, navigation to entry) explicitly stated? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK004 Is the "single primary action per section/dialog" rule specified for all Catalog screens and dialogs that have multiple actions? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK005 Are language-configuration requirements complete for Arabic, English, and "other languages" (list, add/remove, language-specific settings)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-016]
- [ ] CHK006 Are add-new-key flow requirements fully specified (key input, default language required, one input per locale, warning for empty, overwrite-or-cancel on duplicate)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-018]
- [ ] CHK007 Are add-new-language flow requirements specified (source of list, at least Arabic and English, result: enabled locale visible in config and forms)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-019]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK008 Is "consistent visual and interaction model" defined with measurable or enumerable criteria? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK009 Is the minimum viewport width (360px) and the criterion "no horizontal scroll blocking core tasks" explicitly stated and testable? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK010 Is "design system (Material Design 3)" referenced with sufficient specificity (e.g. color roles, typography, components) so conformance can be verified? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002, §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK011 Is "primary workflow in under two minutes" defined for a representative entry so it can be measured? [Clarity, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK012 Is the default language (fallbackLocale at package init) clearly distinguished from "enabled locales" and "supported language list" in requirements? [Clarity, Key Entities]
- [ ] CHK013 Are "primary," "secondary," and "tertiary" button emphasis defined in terms of the design system (e.g. filled vs tonal vs text) so implementation can be checked? [Clarity, Spec §FR-015, Button UX table]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK014 Do validation-display requirements (inline + dedicated panel) align between FR-005, User Story 2 acceptance scenario 3, and Edge Cases? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK015 Are save/load failure behaviors (show error, keep form data / retain loaded state) stated consistently in FR-013, Edge Cases, and Assumptions? [Consistency, Spec §FR-013]
- [ ] CHK016 Are multi-tab/session behavior requirements (defined way, last save wins or reload prompt, data integrity) consistent across FR-014, Edge Cases, and Assumptions? [Consistency, Spec §FR-014]
- [ ] CHK017 Are RTL requirements consistent between FR-006, language configuration (Arabic), and Edge Cases (locale switch)? [Consistency, Spec §FR-006]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK018 Can each Success Criterion (SC-001–SC-012) be objectively verified (e.g. by test or review) without ambiguity? [Acceptance Criteria]
- [ ] CHK019 Is the "design system conformance" success criterion (SC-006) defined so that "documented exceptions" are bounded? [Measurability, Spec §SC-006]
- [ ] CHK020 Is the accessibility level (e.g. contrast, touch targets, semantics) tied to a stated standard or method so SC-007 is verifiable? [Measurability, Spec §SC-007]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK021 Are requirements specified for the zero-state or empty Catalog (no entries)? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK022 Are requirements defined for the "many validation warnings" scenario (manageable list/panel, inline for current entry)? [Coverage, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK023 Are requirements for "data type changed on existing entry" (value handling: clear or convert) explicitly stated? [Coverage, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK024 Are requirements for first-time open on a new platform or window size (layout adapts, no off-screen controls) addressed? [Coverage, Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK025 Is scale (~5,000 entries) explicitly stated with a requirement that list and search remain responsive? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-007, Clarifications]
- [ ] CHK026 Is duplicate-key behavior (warn, overwrite or cancel, form retained on cancel) fully specified? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-018]
- [ ] CHK027 Are requirements for "language configuration change" (reflect without full restart, update validation scope) stated? [Edge Case, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK028 Is fallback behavior when a locale has no value (use default language value at runtime) specified in both add-new-key and runtime display? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-018, Key Entities]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK029 Are performance expectations for list/search at scale (~5k entries) stated in a way that can be checked (e.g. responsive, no blocking)? [Non-Functional, Plan Technical Context]
- [ ] CHK030 Are accessibility requirements (keyboard navigation, screen reader labels/structure) specified for all primary actions and content? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-008, §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK031 Are touch-target and contrast requirements (or reference to design system level) stated for main flows? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-012]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK032 Is the assumption that "validation and warning rules are defined elsewhere" and Catalog only displays them explicitly documented? [Assumption, Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK033 Is the dependency on fallbackLocale being set at package initialization (not in Catalog) clearly stated where default language is used? [Dependency, Key Entities, Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK034 Is the assumption that "single user, multiple tabs/sessions" (same machine) is the supported concurrency model documented? [Assumption, Clarifications]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK035 Is "easy to implement and easy to edit" operationalized (e.g. localized change, clear structure, design-system components) so it can be reviewed? [Clarity, Spec §FR-017, §SC-010]
- [ ] CHK036 Are there any conflicting statements between "Catalog does not set default language" and "language configuration" (view/edit enabled locales)? [Consistency, Key Entities]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant spec sections or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
